_note: Chapter 1 — Kumiko arrives in London. Swain's house -> Colin -> Sally -> Portobello.

c1_carriage.name: Jaguar — Heathrow Run
c1_carriage.desc: Grey motorway, grey rain, a driver who has not spoken since the airport. In your pocket the Maas-Neotek unit is warm as a sparrow. London assembles itself outside the glass, stone by wet stone.

c1_hall.name: Swain's Townhouse — Hall
c1_hall.desc: Notting Hill money, old and recently laundered: parquet, hunting prints nobody ever hunted, and a very large man named Petal materializing to take your coat with terrifying delicacy.

c1_study.name: Swain's Study
c1_study.desc: Leather, brandy, a fire kept lit for effect. Swain wears his obligation to your father like a suit one size too small, and his smile does arithmetic behind its teeth.

c1_guest.name: Guest Room
c1_guest.desc: A high cold room with a view of a private square. Your bags stand unopened. In this house you are a parcel awaiting instructions, and the room knows it.

c1_kitchen.name: Kitchen — Petal's Domain
c1_kitchen.desc: Copper pans, a professional kettle, and Petal reading a racing form with a shotgun's calm. The warmest room in the house, which tells you everything about the house.

c1_parlor.name: Back Parlor
c1_parlor.desc: A television older than your father mutters market reports to empty chairs. The woman by the window stands like a blade at rest, and her eyes, when she turns, are mirrors: Sally Shears, sent to mind you, furious about it somewhere too deep to show.

c1_market.name: Portobello Road — Snow
c1_market.desc: Stalls of dead technology and live silver under falling snow, breath-clouds and barrow cries. Sally buys you tea in a paper cup and a steel star from a stall of edges, and for one hour London is a city instead of a container.
c1_market.locked_text: Not alone. Not this city. Wait for Sally.
